rationale.R1.1: Strengthening requires sharpening the contribution claim, which is currently hedged and diffuse; the paper's thesis (calibration recovers human-eval validity) is buried and understated relative to its novelty.
rationale.R1.2: Central — the artifact contains a material logical inconsistency: GPT-3 is framed as 'the current frontier model' and 'state of the art' while the pilot is dated late 2024, by which time GPT-3 is several generations obsolete; closing this gap is necessary to make the argument coherent.
